# SiteDoctor AI

> AI-powered website auditing and SEO optimization platform that scans sites for performance, SEO, accessibility, and security issues, then delivers prioritized, actionable fixes.

SiteDoctor AI lets anyone enter a URL and instantly receive a detailed audit covering Core Web Vitals, on-page SEO, accessibility (WCAG), security best practices, and AI-generated optimization recommendations. Reports can be exported as branded PDFs, and Pro users unlock keyword research, competitor analysis, and ranking opportunities.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, pricing, and FAQ.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free, Pro, and Enterprise plans with feature comparison.
- [Login](/login): Sign in or create an account.

## Optional

- [Reset Password](/reset-password): Account password recovery.
